reviews_data.review_text: Awesome, high quality, nice atmosphere, got our stuff quick and everything tasted great
Very hospitable and passionate owner. She was very sweet and welcoming, and even let me try my drink before sealing it so I could check the sweetness. Will definitely be supporting this buisness!
Best boba place around! Authentic, semi sweet and delicious! I got the Taro Milk Tea and I’ve had this at many places but nothing compares to Jilly Jelly’s 🫶🏼💕!
I been wanting to try this place for forever and it didn’t disappoint! I tried the egg and pork floss Taiwanese pancake and it was so delicious. I like how they have so many options for drinks

I was so impressed by how kind and welcoming the owner was. He answered all my questions so kindly. His kindness made such an impression that makes you want to support family owned businesses like this. The bubble waffles were delicious 😋 each bite was met with happiness. The original by far is my favorite! The match was so good as well! I still have to try the others though. The ongiri are delightfully cute you almost dont want to eat them... Each bite was met with burst of flavors. My family and I cannot wait to visit again and support such a wonderful business. Thank you!

Went here on a whim. Lady (I think was the owner) was super sweet and helpful. Boba pearls were perfect, not too hard or soft. Taro milk tea delicious. The only thing is kinda dirty in seating area, there was a dead cricket and dirt on windowsill. Some white guy was also sitting at one of the tables with all his notebooks and laptop out and kept looking at customers with dirty looks when they would come in and talk….go to a library weirdo. The space is small so idk who gonna tell him it ain’t a quiet space he gonna catch the wrong one one day. I wouldn’t come back bc the atmosphere is kinda awkward but 5/5 on customer service!!!
Cute place! Delicious boba and obviously someone's labor of love.
They are so amazing and the brown sugar latte with Oreo is to die for!

This is the BEST bubble tea place in Charlotte (and I tried a good number of them before finding this one). Janice is so nice, and everything is delicious. She's been expanding her menu too, so it'd not just bubble tea now, you can also get snow (shaved ice), bubble waffles, ice cream, onigiri, taiwanese pancakes, ramen, and wontons!

My personal recommendations: i love a half sweet wintermellon milk tea with grass jelly and the gyoza onigiri. So good I come here weekly!

This place is a gem! Everything we have tried so far is delicious. The staff is super friendly, kind and helpful. It’s so cute too! Love all the places to sit and be comfy. If you haven’t been here yet, you’re missing out!
Love the atmosphere here. The Lady that took my order was so friendly. Got the strawberry green tea its to my liking.

Stopped by Jilly Jelly Boba Tea and Snow in Matthews for a sweet treat and had a really nice visit. It was a 45 min drive for us but totally worth it.

We had the boba tea and the pop waffles, and both were delightful. The boba was perfectly chewy and the tea was flavorful and refreshing, exactly what you want when you are craving something fun and tasty. The pop waffles were a fun twist on dessert, warm, soft, and balanced perfectly with the toppings we chose.

Service was friendly, and even though it seemed like they can get a little busy at peak times, the staff made sure we had what we needed.

This is a great stop for a casual treat with friends or a quick dessert after shopping or coffee. I would go back to try more drinks and waffle flavors.

The best milk tea that I've had in Charlotte. I've never seen an owner take such care in making each drink to the customer's satisfaction. The building is incredibly charming and such a cute place. I can't recommend this place enough. Definitely try it out!

Owner is incredible sweet and nice, and was worried when we ordered food that 10 whole minutes, for her to make it fresh, was too long. The Taiwanese pancake and onigiri are worth triple that wait EASY.
Plus, the milk tea, taste like good tea not just sugar.
10/10, fantastic.

The wait was worth it🥹🥹
The food and boba was really good here,, the staff is really nice i hope yhe best for them :))
Very good! I remember my favorite store in California! Good job guys
Lady was super nice and friendly at the front. My sisters had a lot of questions about boba and she was very sweet and patient. I also love onigiri one of the only places in clt to get them made!
Janice, the owner, is the sweetest ever! The products are amazing!!! You won't be disappointed!!!!

I stopped by for a road trip snack and it was so good. I got two Onigiris which were delicious and Thai milk tea with boba. I believe the owner was working that night and she let me try my tea before packaging it up to make sure it was the right sweetness.

Very welcoming and yummy boba shop. We got a strawberry matcha latte and coffee milk tea both were so delicious. Owner was very kind and interactive. A very cozy shop, definitely looking forward to returning.
Staff were so kind and welcoming and gave great recommendations. Expect to see me again!
Can’t believe it took me a year to find this spot! The owner is so kind and made me the best boba I’ve had in a long time. AND I got a really cute reusable cup in the process. Winning all the way!

Super cute boba shop! The drinks were delicious and the owner is super knowledgeable/helpful. She also makes a lot of the toppings and flavors herself! Also the cups have such adorable tops with their little bear ears. Will definitely go again when I’m in the area
This cozy shop has some of the best boba I have tried ! The person working behind the counter was kind and patient as I tried to decide .. never rushed me ! And the bubble waffles are yum !!!
Such a cute atmosphere and tasty drinks!!! I got the pandan flavour w/o any boba and it was so yummy :3
Love it really good 👍 I recommend it 👌

Everything about this place is charming. I got to speak to the business owner and she’s very kind and sweet. The music is authentic and the art is enchanting. I only dropped by for boba tea and the owner was very personable. She offered to let me try my tea before leaving, just to make sure I liked it 🥰  I ordered the Thai Black Tea Latte which was delicious with its perfectly soft and chewy boba pearls. A very respectful, chill, cute environment that I definitely would recommend.

There is a QR code on the front door to keep business hours posted; so if it’s closed at an odd hour just scan it to see when the owner will be back.
Everything we tried was so delicious. One of our favorite places from now on.
Amazing service and prices! Tea was incredible and the atmosphere is so adorable. Perfect treat for anyone in the area.
The owner was sweet and understanding, boba was delicious!
She is so sweet and her kindness was through the roof my first time being here. it tastes so good!! and the boba is perfect!
All sorts of sweet and savory Asian snack. The family loves this place. Something for everyone.
Best bubble tea in Matthews! Super friendly owner - recommend!
Absolute hidden gem! My daughter and I went in with no knowledge of boba and they were very good about walking us through the items and making great recommendations.

Came here today for the first time and it was such a great experience. The really kind woman that took our order took time to make sure that we would like our drinks by asking if we would like to try the drink first before she had sealed it off and she made sure she used every last drop for the drinks. Amazing first experience and I would definitely recommend.
Very amazing customer service. Had a wide variety of options and was made with love and care
Really cute and cozy place!
Great service, wonderful tea!
This place was amazing the dinks they had where so good they gave us free origami birds

This cafe is the absolute cutest!! My coworker bought boba for me once from here and to this day, I still use the plastic bottle because its cat ears. I went today before getting something next door, and the boba was super amazing and yummy. The owner or person working was also super sweet and energetic. The prices are also great
Greta environment and people!
super cute shop, good tea
There are a lot more choices of drinks but I just took a picture of the first drink page. Amazing atmosphere, very aesthetic. I am the 300th reviewer and can confirm that this place is amazing.
Great cute little shop!

Lofi girl like atmosphere, phenomenal staff, tasty food, and delicious boba. Plus they have the cutest art I’ve seen in a boba shop ever! I wish more shops like this were around! 😩😩

(Gave 5 star after first visit, came back again)
Oh my god it got even better, I tried the gyodon onigiri and it was awesome, but then I tried the pork floss onigiri and HOT DAMN was it good. Staff were kind and patient despite the place being busy.

Still 5/5 👹
Such a quaint, cozy little place to enjoy your tea.
Great service and location is adorable :)
By far the best boba I’ve had in Charlotte! The onigiri is very good as well!
This place is amazing, it’s chill, the boba is great, 10/10
Love their taiwanese pancake and drinks
The owner was occupied and we had to wait for more than 20 minutes and she didn't even look us in the eyes or told us to wait a second. In the end, we had to go somewhere else

Cute spot to hang out with friends. Its not just boba tea they have snack items and snow (bingsu). Its the finest shaved ice, flavored with matcha, taro or fruit. The lady was kind enough to customize my order. Yummy!
Such a cute atmosphere, super nice staff, and great tasting drinks!

Amazing boba! Great service and super cute little decorated boba shop. Will definitely come back again! The food was the perfect balance of savory and sweet and left a huge smile on my entire family’s faces. The  lady working was amazing and super kind to all of her customers, as well as an amazing drink maker! Best boba in all of Charlotte!
Loved the egg and cheese pancake and mango boba tea.
It was just amazing! This is the first time I try this drink and I liked it very much. And I'm glad that I made this drink in this place.
The drinks and atmosphere here are amazing. Ive come here a couple times when I’ve been in the area, everyone here is so kind. Ill be stopping by every time whenever I’m passing through the area : )

Amazing staff, the owner is really nice and friendly. They go out of their way to make sure you enjoy anything you buy, and always ask if theres any adjustments they can make, or anything else they can do.

I highly recommend this place to anyone who’s in the area or passing by.
Great fun, unique yummies, just a wonderful delight.
The best boba place around! Owner is amazing. She even let us come in a couple minutes past closing which was so nice and is very much appreciated!

Just went and omg sweetest lady helped us and made sure we enjoyed our tea! Didn’t get her name but she was the only one working there. And the tea is AMAZING, honeydew milk green tea and rose lychee green tea 10/10 recommend🤗
Came here while visiting charlotte and it’s very cute. Not very busy and kind of a small space. Service was excellent prices are fair and it tasted amazing.
Super cute place. Very nice staff. I like they ask about the level of sweetness you want so it's more customizable. Great tea. And super cute cups!
Super clean place! Very friendly staff and the tea and boba is amazing! Yayyy
My favorite place to get boba in Charlotte!
Incredible tea! The owner is super nice too!
Delicious boba, cute atmosphere and super sweet staff! Happy to have found a local boba spot ✨

Best place in Charlotte for authentic Taiwanese boba! The flavor of the tea is complemented by the flavoring and not dominated by sugar or syrup. For example, there were actual osmanthus flowers in the "osmanthus oolong"!!! They also tailor to your specific taste and let you try the sweetness and adjust accordingly before finishing the drink.
Very creamy and flavorful. Try regular brown sugar milk tea with creme brulee toping.
Such kind staff and great service!

The owner is so enthusiastic and kind! I haven’t tried the snacks yet, but my boba tea was great. I love that you can get whatever percentage of sweet or ice here in your drink too. The lavender was super subtle.
Love this place the owner is super cool and the teas are delish! Cute vibe too def recommend
The brown sugar latte was great. She was very friendly

This place is right beside my job and I wanted to give it a chance because I love boba so much. Definitely don’t regret it at all. Loved the service and the drink tastes amazing. Will for sure be coming back
the best boba place ong

Really impressed by how delicious and fresh the tea and toppings are, and the owner was incredibly nice and helpful!

I ordered an XL lavender oolong. I initially wanted matcha agar boba but the owner was very kind to ask if I’d had it before as not everyone likes the flavor. I’m not picky and sure I would’ve liked it, but to be safe I went with typical tapioca boba and grass jelly. She generously added in a few of the agar boba so I could try it. I really did like it! It’s soft but with more of a crunch than chew like tapioca boba, it reminds me of lychee jelly.
My fiancé ordered an XL peach green tea. She didn’t have enough peach at the time so he asked to add in passion fruit and it came out perfect!
For both our drinks she let us taste them before closing them up, which I thought was really nice and personal! And the tapioca boba is fantastic, good size with the best soft chew. Can’t wait to go back and try more!
Shop is pretty, menus are awesome and tea is delicious 😋
I tried the Hokkaido milk tea, and it was delicious! The service was quick, she let me taste it before adding ice to ensure it was sweet enough :)

This is by far the best boba tea in the Charlotte area. Owner said the teas and some ingredients are imported directly from Taiwan, where boba tea originated, hence the flavors are really authentic. The sweetness can be adjusted to one's personal preference. Apart from bubble waffles, now they also have onigiri with three different flavors. It's such a hidden gem for a quick drink and snacks. They also accept bulk party orders and the drinks will come in cute plastic flasks.
Best boba I have ever had, and customer service is chefs kiss✨✨
TOP TIER
So so so so so so good
The best boba drink I have ever had. The owner was friendly, kind, and welcoming. The decor inside is so fun. I can’t wait to try the bubble waffles!
O.M.G I LOVE this place.And the Thai black tea with the mango popping boba(a topping) Is SOOO good and I love it!
Go go go!! Read her story on her menu. Such a beautiful atmosphere and the yummiest drinks. You won’t regret, I put my soul on that.
Great service, menu selection is wonderful and has more than most other boba places. Staff is very friendly.
Customer service was really good! The people were so nice. I would highly recommend this boba place! The cups are so cute.

I think the owner got changed.  The matcha flavor was weak. The taste isn't the same as one used to get.
_ _
We got the Peach Fruit Tea& Red Guava Fruit Tea. Both were so delicious! I like it! :)

Such a welcoming small business. The interior is calming and beautiful with lots of fresh flowers. They offer beautiful book bound menus. The staff is friendly and the tea I ordered was delicious. I was able to use my laptop and get work done in a quiet place. I will definitely come back to try the food next time.
Absolute gem and must try. Hands down best oolong tea I've ever tried. Taiwanese pancakes are delicious 😋 Highly recommend!!!
Such a good spot! The lady who served us was so sweet and my drink was delicious!!
Friendly staff and really good boba. Definitely my go to boba when I’m in the area.
The drinks are so good and the woman is so gentle.
My go-to boba place in Charlotte! They are the best in the area. The owner knows so much about tea and lets you try out the tea to adjust the sweetness and taste.
Me encanto, todo estuvo muy lindo y las bebidas son muy deliciosas y eso no es todo, también tiene para tomarse fotos. Se los recomiendo mucho😍
It was really cute and aesthetic but the drinks were bad. The drinks were overly sweet and the tapioca gave a weird aftertaste.

The young girl at the counter was happy and friendly and awesome. The bubble teas were ok. The cups are really cute. However.. the older lady working there was awful to her (I assume) daughter! Yelled at her for taking an order the way she did, and kept going on and on. She made the young man who was working fumble and get nervous, and she just pushed him out of the way and pushed the girl out of the way. He just acted like that has happened all of his life, and kept talking about needing counseling, that he'd never be good enough.  It was awful.

We didn’t really know how to order boba so the owner talked us through it. She was so kind and patient! Then she let my kids try their drinks to see if she needed to make any modifications to make sure they liked them. Such a fun experience learning something new! We’ll definitely be back! Thanks Jilly!!
Nice staff, quick service, nice quiet place to work!
Place wasn’t busy but the owner was super nice! Helped us choose what drinks we wanted. Thank u!
Lovely owner very accommodating to my needs when it came to dairy milk. Super humble and sweet . Welcoming atmosphere and I enjoy how it smell sweet like waffles upon entry ~

It was super crowded but worth the wait!!! You can basically customize your drinks, and Janice is pretty quick to make your drink! It’s a small location but the best boba I’ve ever had! The tapioca was cooked well with the milk tea! Definitely recommend!

I stumbled upon this gem after a relaxing visit to a park near Monroe, and I can confidently say—this is the boba spot you don’t want to miss! From the moment I walked in, I was welcomed with such warmth and kindness. The owner is an absolute sweetheart—despite being busy, she took the time to chat with me, making me feel like a truly valued customer. Her generosity blew me away—she gave me extra boba in an extra-large cup with no ice, ensuring I got the full, flavorful experience!

And let’s talk about the boba itself—absolute perfection! The texture was spot on, the flavors were rich and refreshing, and every sip was a little piece of heaven. I was thrilled to hear they’ll be adding food to the menu soon, so you can bet I’ll be back regularly for my boba fix and some delicious snacks.

If you’re looking for the best boba experience, look no further. This spot is one of a kind, and every visit is guaranteed to be delightful. Don’t just take my word for it—go treat yourself! You won’t regret it.
delicious bubble teas, milk teas, and bubble waffles :) hidden gem.
The owner really goes above and beyond to make customers happy
Excellent all around. Pricing is great Product is great and service is great. My go to spot every Sunday.
Absolutely LOVE this place! We come here once a week, always incredible service and product! She is the sweetest woman and always remembers us. Could not recommend this place enough!
Really great place with amazing service

Great atmosphere! The boba is super delicious, I will definitely be back to get the rose green tea! The worker was the sweetest, she offered us to try the boba before she put the lid to make sure we liked it. Will definitely be back to jilly jelly, so cute!
I’ve been going here for a long time now and it’s always excellent. Both drinks and service. Janice works very hard, giving off a smile that brightens your day.

Open on New Year’s Day! I tried the matcha red bean waffle and it was good. I also tried their oolong milk tea with almond milk and boba. The boba is warm which is what I prefer ( my fav part) and brown sugar sweet! I would come back for sure. The owner was very nice as well.
Some of the best service and tea around!

Unfortunately I don’t have any photos to show how beautiful and friendly this place is. Though, this place was really nice and the drinks were amazing. Also, their matcha red bean bubble waffle were delicious. I would highly recommend this place.
Very sweet and courteous owner, quite good boba! Very good desert items too! Definitely a good place to pass by for a snack, and a good drink!!!!

The nice lady with blonde hair and glasses has an amazing 👏 amazing vibe. The place is comfy and friendly all at the same time. Me and my friends even started jamming because it was so chill. Illustrations everywhere were cute too. Please please try the raspberry  milk black tea 🍵
Amazing place! Wonderful food and amazing drinks❤️ highly recommend it!

went on christmas day so it wasn’t very busy, and the owner (i’m assuming) was extremely accommodating and polite, asking us to try each drink to test the sweetness out before she sealed it up. cute place for photos, good music, check this place out!
THE INSIDE OF THE STORE WAS SO PRETTY !!!! + the drink is so good, i’m about to finish it and I just got it less than five minutes agoooo 😍
Delicious quality boba tea spot!  The owner sources her tea from Taiwan and takes pride in her products which shows in the quality and taste!  Top notch soft, chewy & fresh boba!  Love this place!
Amazing drinks! 🤤 Wonderful customer service as well. She asked exactly what we wanted and how sweet. Got the mango green tea with boba. Delicious! And the cutest cups and artwork too!
Amazing Boba!!!! Thanks again we will be back
To make a long review short... just go! You will not, and I repeat, will not be disappointed. Had the bubble waffle and three different boba drinks.

Very tasty and delicious products!
An absolute adorable establishment!
Such a cute hidden gem! Great customer service and delicious Boba tea :)
Super pleasant interaction with the owner(?). Loved coming here. Would recommend!

Jolly Jelly had the best employee i have ever met. She was so kind and helpful. Tea was great and bubble waffle was a 12/10. I definitely recommend. Come to Jilly Jelly for the best ambience that you have ever seen. So yummy it fills up your tummy. This place helped cure my seasonal depression making me excited for winter. GET A WAFFLE IF YOU COME THEY ARE BUSSIN. Jill Jelly I will be coming back and I am extremely happy with my experience here.
Kind and very helpful.  Great service and lots of options.  Clean and warm  shop. Tea is brewed just right
This place is ridiculously cute inside and the tea is delicious! I highly recommend making a stop

Nice little place for some bobba tea.
They also sell waffles with filling that are pretty good.

The times I've gone the service is a little slow. I guess they need more workers. But definitely worth going and I'm definitely going back for my teas!

Had an amazing experience here with my boyfriend. I'm not sure if the lady helping us was the owner, but she was amazing. She was super excited to answer our questions and share stories about the culture with us. Ontop of all that, the atmosphere was so cute, warm, and welcoming. We almost turned around after finishing our drinks to get more. Can't wait to go back!
I actually threw up after drinking my drink WAY too sweet and I love boba but the boba here is disgusting. Was not worth my money or 20 minutes waiting for 2 drink on a empty monday
Great service, cute atmosphere, delicious drinks!
Great Boba and friendly service. I love all the flavors!! Highly recommend the Hokkaido milk tea!

Jilly Jelly is a true gem for boba lovers! From the moment you walk in, the cozy and vibrant atmosphere makes you feel right at home. The boba itself is always perfectly chewy, and the range of flavors they offer is impressive. Their menu balances classic milk teas with unique, creative blends—whether you’re craving something fruity, creamy, or even a bit adventurous, they’ve got you covered.

One of the standout features is their use of high-quality ingredients, which really makes a difference in every sip. You can taste the freshness, from their handcrafted jellies to their rich and smooth teas. And if you have dietary preferences, they’re super accommodating, with options for different milk types and sweetness levels.

The staff at Jilly Jelly are always friendly and ready to recommend new flavors to try. It’s clear they have a passion for what they do, and it shows in every drink they serve. Whether you’re a boba newbie or a longtime fan, Jilly Jelly is a must-visit spot that never disappoints!

I came in today as it was my first time with my brother and my mom and the owner’s aura was just so bright and illuminating. She greeted my brother by name which threw me off at first because I thought she personally knew him, turns out he’s come often already! Haha but we had a mom and daughter in front of us and just watching the interaction was just so wholesome because she makes sure each customer is taken care of and is satisfied with their drink before leaving and I just knew she puts so much passion into her craft. I love the whole ambiance of her store. I had a lavender milk tea with boba, which I love lavender although sometimes at other places it just comes out too floral/perfumey in a way but hers was just divine! I’ll have to try out her recommendation with oolong tea instead of milk tea. I live about 45 minutes away but honestly so worth it and I’ll make sure to get a few more next time I come by I just know it’ll be my favorite new boba spot in Charlotte! ❤️
Best boba. Best customer service. The young lady at the front really cares/ wants to make sure your boba tastes exactly how you want it to. Will definitely be coming back.

Having lived in Taiwan and New York, and having spent considerable time in California, + having been to the original boba shop that invented boba in Taichung several times, Jilly Jelly boba is as authentic as they come. I have had fruit flavored slushes and boba milk tea and the flavors are perfect. Hands down the best boba shop in Charlotte area!

The person serving us was so nice and told us about Hokkido and Okinawa milk tea and the differences.

The tapioca boba came out so fresh it was chewy and warm for my Hokkido milk tea
Ótimo lugar

Beautiful place , excellent customer service, clean
Over all 10/10
Awesome experience!
the owner was so so kind and provided great service!! definitely recommend checking this place out. the taro smoothie was delicious!

GREAT place for Boba Tea and MANY other wonderful eats and treats. Try the Bubble Waffle as well. Their Honey Lemon Green Tea is my favorite. And the staff is awesome, fun, and very pleasant to talk with.
i work on the other side of this building, and i'm here so often. i love the drinks, and i'm obsessed with the new bubble waffles! a great place to get a treat with some friends :)

reviews_data.review_text: Sooooo GOOD
Amazing boba it is better than any of the boba I have tried
First time visit and we will be back. Drinks made to order and all were delicious. Very cute atmosphere. Service was great.

The lady who I assume runs the store is so nice and accommodating. The teas are delicious and I definitely will be back. Its just a bit far for me but definitely worth the drive occasionally for a nice treat

The atmosphere and vibe this place brings is unlike most in the area. Its comfortable and welcoming, with easy to understand menus and pricing, plenty of seating and accommodations for guests who are interested in trying something new. The shops owner who served me just in the first hour of opening was very kind and friendly, and considerate of my choices to ensure my milk tea was to my liking, which it was! Absolutely delicious and rich flavor, not one taste overpowered the rest. Please give Jilly Jelly a try!

Super amazing customer service. I had questions and each was answered thoroughly with lots of information I never knew about. The boba tea was delicious. The girl who took care of me was super sweet. Definitely recommend!
Such a cute delicious boba spot in matthews area, the woman working there was so sweet! Highly recommend!!!!

This place is so cute and cozy. I’m love the atmosphere and the owner is just the sweetest and most hospitable woman. I’ve never felt so comfortable or had such good service in a boba shop. I cannot recommend this place enough!

We stopped in yesterday for a drink since we were in Matthews and craving boba. Jilly Jelly actually makes true Taiwanese boba drinks. I got the rose lychee green tea and the tapioca was perfection. Bubble waffle was also delicious and the perfect snack. Highly recommend anyone to visit and try them out. Fantastic service and always love to support local small businesses.

Amazing place. They need social media presence for this business.  It is AMAZING!!!.

We went somewhere else and loved it and the other one was too far today, so we found this GEM and WOW!!!! SOOOO much better than the other place. Many of their ingredients are made from scratch. Yes. It's not a pre-made mixture.

The owner was very nice and helpful , the boba was the best I've ever had , and the Boba waffle, I never knew existed...with RUM ICE CREAM .... it's called Exhausted Parent , which is sooo true!!!

New to boba??? Jilly Jelly even let's you try some things to see what your palette likes before you order.

Spread the word for this business so they can grow.

We WILL come back, next time in Charlotte!!!!!!

Oh my gorsh! I am a Boba connoisseur from NYC and have tested out NY, New Mexico and Kentucky Boba shops and this is the very best boba drink I have tasted!!!! Earthy, complex and educational (I got to learn even more about how it’s made). This was super yummy and staff is great! I’ll be back tomorrow before finishing my Charlotte tour!
We were greeted nicely and the lady helped us out a lot with deciding.

Our family of 6 visited here for the 1st time last week. Our order consisted of 2 oreo slushies with boba, 2 Taro slushies with jelly, 1 Taro green tea with boba,  1 Melon green tea with boba. WE LOVED IT ALL!
Superior customer service to where they thoroughly explained all the options and how they differed.
Cute, comfy and clean cafe. ✨️
amazing food, owner super kind, lots of seating, very nice decor

Yummy drinks and egg waffles 😍
Very friendly staff!
great service! very fast & very yummy drinks! the decor was so cute in the shop, my friend and i enjoyed it!
Everything was perfect honestly. I asked for extra sugar and they provided it. They also asked for me to taste for sugar which was a wonderful touch. I love this place, definitely recommend for boba.

Superior service compared to any boba shop I've been to, coming from New York I am always looking for good bubble tea and I am so glad I stopped by here. The lady at the counter was very kind and let us try our drinks before she sealed them to see if we liked it as well as helped us with recommendation. Very patient as well as generous with toppings. There is a wide variety of flavors that you cannot find at shops like Kung Fu Tea or Sharetea, etc.

The inside is really cute and I see they sell egg waffles and ice cream which looks delicious.

Even my mom who doesn't like most boba said that it was really good.

We got two oolong milk teas and one dragonfruit tea with cream cheese topping and boba as well as a passionfruit green tea with boba.

I recommend anyone to come here and try out their boba.

Thanks Jilly Jelly Boba and Snow for the great experience today!
This place is so cute! The staff are polite and friendly, the atmosphere is calm and pleasant, and the drinks are delicious!
Lovely place, beautiful interior, kind employees

Coming from the university city area, this place is 50000% worth the drive. Jill is passionate, sweet, and so caring. Not to mention the drinks were made to perfection AND the inside is adorable? My boyfriend and I will totally be back. Thank you so much, Jill! 🩷
The BEST boba I have had! Will definitely be back!
The lady taking our order was amazing! My family and I enjoyed all of our drinks. Would come again
Really good boba and atmosphere. I would definitely go again if I lived in Charlotte. Highly recommended.

Best Boba place I've been too! We weren't sure exactly what we wanted, and the recommendations we were giving were perfect! They were very accommodating and patient with us while ordering and the drinks taste amazing!

This is some of the best tea in charlotte! I had the rose lychee green tea and it was perfect. The great thing is the owner has you taste it before the lid goes on and if it’s not perfect she will adjust it!

Great tea flavor and the syrup doesn’t overwhelm it.

Even close to closing she had perfectly chewy boba!
very nice place

When I walked into the Jilly Jelly there was a family of three waiting for their drinks. One of their drinks had to be remade because it spilled everywhere when the straw was inserted. There was only one bobarista working, Janice, who was doing a great job despite the rush. All the cups and spoons needed to make our drinks had to be washed, so Janice gave us an estimated wait time of 15 minutes for our four large drinks. We didn’t mind waiting as we understood the situation.
Janice lets customers try their drinks before sealing them, which I think is a very good practice.
We ordered a pineapple slush, which tasted amazing and reminded me of real sweet pineapples—definitely a 10/10. The mango slush was also very good and had an authentic taste. The passion fruit green tea was to die for; unlike other places where it's usually too sweet and tastes like you're drinking sugar water, here it was balanced deliciously. The brown sugar latte brought a sense of nostalgia, as it tasted just like Cinnamon Toast Crunch.
We also had the chance to try a soon-to-be-released item: little egg-shaped waffles filled with a choice of mozzarella, American cheese, or chocolate-filled mochi. They were so delicious and we can't wait for them to be officially launched!
Please go follow @JILLYJELLYBOBAANDSNOW on Instagram!

Very pleasant atmosphere and extremely well service. 👌 Boba is awesome! I highly recommend this place for ice cream and Boba. Everything they offer here is amazing, and it's a great place to come and chill on a hot, sunny day.
Lovely place and lovely people! Had to wait a bit but was completely worth it. 10/10 will come back again.
Super cute and relaxed spot!
10/10 GREAT EXPERIENCE!! Customer service is amazing and SO VERY FRIENDLY!!! We will absolutely be back soon!!!

Okay. I’m not the person to write a review but I had such a bad experience here. I went in and asked for a medium brown sugar latte with boba. She made the drink then asked me to “drink it down” so she could add ice to it. I asked her if she could just pour it in a large cup with ice and she said that I didn’t pay for a large… so I took a sip of the drink, she added ice, and I walked out. When I got in my car, I realized that 50% of my drink was froth. This was by far the most bizarre and awful customer service experience I’ve ever had.
The lady who works there is very nice and hospitable. I wish her business nothing but the best going forward. And I really enjoyed the raspberry milk tea Boba.
Cute aesthetic and very tasty food

Really nice little place !! I had the mango green tea with lychee jellies. Very refreshing!! My wife had a raspberry mocha slushy that was great as well. Tons of options and can be a little overwhelming. Dont worry..the owner was fantastic and answered about 10 questions for us. Explained everything
Visited while in the area, loved it! Will be back!
We love it here! The owner is the sweetest and my kids love the boba tea and bubble waffles!
Awesome boba teas
The tea is always so good, and the boba is always fresh. Highly recommend if you like boba!
Amazing!! So good, sweetest people!
Excellent Boba Tea! Very nice and helpful proprietor. We really enjoyed our teas and will be back for sure! Can’t wait!
This place is awesome!  Janice is awesome - so friendly and welcoming!!  We will be back lots

Coming from California + being Taiwanese, it’s really hard to find good boba here!! This is the only place I can say tastes like something I could get back in California or Taiwan. I super recommend coming here!! If you’ve never had boba outside of Charlotte, you should totally come try some authentic boba milk tea. Also the owner is really nice and shop is cute

Went here for the first time yesterday and had a truly nice experience. I ordered the matcha slush with boba and my sister ordered the mango black tea with mango jelly.
The owner was extremely kind and asked us about the sweetness in case she needed to tailor them more to us.

We ended up liking each other's drinks so much we switched. Hahaha

Highly recommended coming here if you're looking for a new boba place to try. Don't be afraid to tell her how little or how much sweetness you typically like!

Absolutely one of the best customer service experiences I've had. Good selection of ice cream wonderful selection of boba tea and the little Waffle thing that they make there is amazing I highly recommend this place

The owner is actually the best! She is so personable and is very passionate. The Thai tea is by far the BEST boba I’ve ever had. Everytime I go somewhere else after having her tea, I’m very disappointed..

Here’s what I like about this place, it’s a local, private owned, and higher quality than many other local options. Jill is passionate about her products. She seems to be experimenting and trying new things. She asked the customers questions and is prepared to adapt to their taste. If you want it a little more sweet, no problem. If you want it less sweet, no problem. It’s not fast food boba, it’s a craft tea beverage.
Owner is very nice and amazing! Cares a lot about every drink and is very detailed. Highly recommend for boba lovers!!!
The BEST boba tea in Charlotte!
This is a hidden gem! We popped by for a Friday afternoon treat and got 2 slushes, 2 bobas and 1 iced coffee and all were amazing!

Have been coming to this spot even before the new owner, but now the owner is extremely nice and helpful! I come in every week with my brothers and get the Lavender & Hokkaido milk tea. Favorite boba place in all of Charlotte 💜
Adorable place and it had my favorite ice cream ( super human)
I love their fruit teas (especially the honeydew)! The bubble waffle is also one of my favorites. Fun vibe and the owner is SUPER nice.
Great service, delicious tea! I’m going back when I have time to sit in their cute lounge area. Support this local small business!
Great customer service, cute shop, reasonably priced and my daughter thought her boba milk tea was delicious!
The owner is so sweet! Love this cute little place! Keep up the great work 🩷

First time here and I had a great convo with the owner. She’s so passionate about her business and took time to explain teas for us! She’s seriously so kind and informative. Can’t wait to come again! She’s awesome and the indoor is soo cute
Really lovely clean place, a gem of an owner & boba shop hidden in plain sight. Great fresh tea & toppings galore to try!
Janice was very friendly and helpful. My wife loved her peach green tea with passion fruit jellies. We'll be back soon!
Really good boba and great and friendly service.

They’re renovated lately and it looks so cute and made it extra homey. I love the decor and everytime i know i can get the same thing with the same amazing service and not have to worry. I love the ladies that are here when i am and they usually remember me or my order.

I don’t live near here much but when i am in the area i make sure to stop by!!
I tried the match milk tea with brown sugar boba, excellent flavor. Will be coming back!
Boba is delicous & the service was so friendly!
Delicious and great recommendations!

Amazing service- I was asked if I wanted to test my sweetness level before my drink was sealed, there was great attention to detail.

The Taro cream tea is very high quality and fresh- not artificially purple and very delicious.
Lovely owner, we go here very often, amazing customer service, great atmosphere, 100% recommend
Always come here after getting my nails done. Always super nice and the boba is SO GOOD 💖
Great Boba tea!
This place is the best! Absolutely amazing people and so kind! Definitely recommend!!!
the lady behind the counter was the sweetest ever in the world! so thoughtful! (and it’s delish)
It’s a very cute place and clean inside. I ordered two drinks and both were delicious. Will be coming back soon!

Best boba in Charlotte!! The tea and coffee are delicious and you can tell a lot of care goes into making it. Definitely worth giving it a try. Not to mention the boba is so soft and chewy. 🥰 super glad I decided to stop by.
This is a little boba shop. It is so good. The lady who runs it is very nice and the boba is delicious. If ever in the area give her a try!
My friend and I had a great experience at Jilly Jelly and it is by far the best boba tea I’ve had since moving to Charlotte! I highly recommend!
Great vibes, delicious tea, perfect boba
It’s so cute in here and boba was really good! The lady in there was really sweet as well.

My 4yr old son asked for boba as a special treat and we saw the reviews here. Can definitely see why this place is so highly rated! The owner was so sweet, and the drinks were even more so! Even in the rain it just hit the spot.
I LOVE their boba so much and it is the probably my number one boba place to go to.

So happy I got to try this place. I ordered Strawberry Matcha Latte and holy moly it was so good. Normally I max out on sweetness level with every boba shop I go. I decided not to here and so glad. It was the right sweet level for me. The owner was super sweet and friendly. Has lots of drink flavors I would love to try. Also, they sell ice cream as well. I am coming back when she comes out with a new flavor. Can't wait!
from NY. Craved for a boba tea nearby and I found this place to get an authentic Taiwanese bubble tea! It tasted as good as I tried in the city! Satisfying😀
Awesome place~ brown sugar bubble tea is my favorite drink. Jilly jelly makes better then gong cha and tiger suger. Best best bubble tea~~
We got the rose-lychee milk tea & the brown sugar Oreo!
Excelente!!

Owner Janice is great and very personable. I had the Thai tea and she let me adjust the sugar levels and it was great. I love the seals on the drinks. And I do like how she has redone the place, as an earlier reviewer mentioned.
This is such a cute place and has the best boba I’ve ever had

Me and my best friend came here for the first time, and she recommended us specific topics & flavors. The coconut jelly is CHEFS KISS!! The lady is so sweet as well she told us about items she’s gonna add to her new menu. Coming back once it is released!

I've been here a few times and it's amazing every time. Service is always great. I had the Dragon Fruit the first time and the Lychee tea. So good.

This family never disappoints. They also have a Poke no.1 and it's my favorite. So of course I have to check out the boba. I get something every time I go to the pet store so it's close by. Gluten and dairy free options available. Highly recommend.

Visiting from San Francisco, I asked to go to a Boba place (Boba is VERY popular there)! Stopped by here on New Year’s Day and this place is JUST like home!!
The owner was VERY helpful in helping my friend pick out his first (boba) tea drink and he actually likes it (he chose lychee jelly vs Tapioca/boba).
I was torn between Matcha or Hokkaido Milk Tea and she recommended Hokkaido. While making our teas, she had us try a sample of each our teas and it is SO good!!
I HIGHLY recommend coming here for a REAL boba tea drink♥️🧋.
Thank you for the hospitality, Jilly Jelly!! Best of luck for 2024!!!!

They have Chocolate Shoppe ice cream! The tea is delicious and they were so helpful letting us adjust our sugar levels, even test-tasting the tea and refilling our drinks before sealing. It is delicious! Will definitely come back again.
Go to place.
Delicious drinks and welcoming, friendly service with a very cool, modern atmosphere. We will return for ice cream soon also.
Amazing I love it here exceptional service. Best boba in Charlotte

I came here to get boba before dropping my cousin off at her home, it was an eye opening experience. After taking just one sip of the boba I was immediately awake, no caffeine, just great boba. I got the strawberry smoothie with mango popping boba.

Excellent service, environment, and Tea's err... Ice cream in under 10 yo. Go to this establishment if looking for quality and enjoyment,  not necessarily speed of service, though they provide as quickly as a quality business can provide. Great people, great product , I will continue to make the drive from SC. Have a Great Thanksgiving.  Thank you.
Loved the Thai Milk Tea! Delicious!
I think it’s the best boba tea around here! Ordered honey green milk tea and it’s exactly how I remembered it from Taiwan! Will definitely come back :)
Love love love!!!! The owner is so sweet and kind, the atmosphere is so aesthetic and cute and the drinks are amazing! We got the mango matcha and honeydew with tapioca and they were delicious!
One word “Awesomeness”! The drinks are a Super Treat. Had the Mango and the Coconut, absolutely delicious. Be back real soon.
The drinks are refreshingly delicious and drove here to check it out. Definitely- we return again. Refreshingly Healthy Drinks
Boba tea was REALLY great! They have super premium ice cream too, which was awesome!

I recently visited this delightful bubble tea shop in Charlotte, NC, and I must say, it was an extraordinary experience! The moment I walked in, I was greeted by the friendly staff and an expansive menu. The shop is cozy, clean and cute.

The star of the show was undoubtedly their Lychee Green Tea. It was a perfect blend of refreshing green tea infused with the sweetness of lychee. The freshness and quality of the tea was truly satisfying. It was an authentic bubble tea experience better than the bubble tea shops we have in NY.

The staff was amazing. They were not only knowledgeable about their menu but also incredibly patient in helping me choose the perfect option. Their attention to detail and dedication to customer satisfaction were truly commendable.

The ambiance of the shop was cozy and inviting, making it a great place to relax and enjoy my drink. The attention to cleanliness and hygiene also added to the overall positive impression.

This bubble tea shop exceeded all my expectations. It will undoubtedly be my go-to spot for bubble tea when in NC. I can't wait to visit again and explore more of their menu!
First time here, employee was super nice! Delicious tea, would love to come back!
Janice was so sweet like her tea🧋 Definitely the spot to go in Clt/Matthews!
What a hidden gem.

My new favorite tea spot! This place is wonderful, from the moment we walked in we were impressed. The woman behind the counter was so kind and welcoming. With her suggestions and patience, as I tried to decide, it was much appreciated. We ordered the Peach Oolong tea that was just the right amount of sweet, a Boba Milk tea also incredible, and then a Dragonfruit green tea that was the perfect mixture of sour and sweet. It's such a welcoming a cute shop with so many things to try for sure. It's worth checking out!

reviews_data.review_text: Awesome, high quality, nice atmosphere, got our stuff quick and everything tasted great
Very hospitable and passionate owner. She was very sweet and welcoming, and even let me try my drink before sealing it so I could check the sweetness. Will definitely be supporting this buisness!
Best boba place around! Authentic, semi sweet and delicious! I got the Taro Milk Tea and I’ve had this at many places but nothing compares to Jilly Jelly’s 🫶🏼💕!
I been wanting to try this place for forever and it didn’t disappoint! I tried the egg and pork floss Taiwanese pancake and it was so delicious. I like how they have so many options for drinks

I was so impressed by how kind and welcoming the owner was. He answered all my questions so kindly. His kindness made such an impression that makes you want to support family owned businesses like this. The bubble waffles were delicious 😋 each bite was met with happiness. The original by far is my favorite! The match was so good as well! I still have to try the others though. The ongiri are delightfully cute you almost dont want to eat them... Each bite was met with burst of flavors. My family and I cannot wait to visit again and support such a wonderful business. Thank you!

Went here on a whim. Lady (I think was the owner) was super sweet and helpful. Boba pearls were perfect, not too hard or soft. Taro milk tea delicious. The only thing is kinda dirty in seating area, there was a dead cricket and dirt on windowsill. Some white guy was also sitting at one of the tables with all his notebooks and laptop out and kept looking at customers with dirty looks when they would come in and talk….go to a library weirdo. The space is small so idk who gonna tell him it ain’t a quiet space he gonna catch the wrong one one day. I wouldn’t come back bc the atmosphere is kinda awkward but 5/5 on customer service!!!
Cute place! Delicious boba and obviously someone's labor of love.
They are so amazing and the brown sugar latte with Oreo is to die for!

This is the BEST bubble tea place in Charlotte (and I tried a good number of them before finding this one). Janice is so nice, and everything is delicious. She's been expanding her menu too, so it'd not just bubble tea now, you can also get snow (shaved ice), bubble waffles, ice cream, onigiri, taiwanese pancakes, ramen, and wontons!

My personal recommendations: i love a half sweet wintermellon milk tea with grass jelly and the gyoza onigiri. So good I come here weekly!

This place is a gem! Everything we have tried so far is delicious. The staff is super friendly, kind and helpful. It’s so cute too! Love all the places to sit and be comfy. If you haven’t been here yet, you’re missing out!
Love the atmosphere here. The Lady that took my order was so friendly. Got the strawberry green tea its to my liking.

Stopped by Jilly Jelly Boba Tea and Snow in Matthews for a sweet treat and had a really nice visit. It was a 45 min drive for us but totally worth it.

We had the boba tea and the pop waffles, and both were delightful. The boba was perfectly chewy and the tea was flavorful and refreshing, exactly what you want when you are craving something fun and tasty. The pop waffles were a fun twist on dessert, warm, soft, and balanced perfectly with the toppings we chose.

Service was friendly, and even though it seemed like they can get a little busy at peak times, the staff made sure we had what we needed.

This is a great stop for a casual treat with friends or a quick dessert after shopping or coffee. I would go back to try more drinks and waffle flavors.

The best milk tea that I've had in Charlotte. I've never seen an owner take such care in making each drink to the customer's satisfaction. The building is incredibly charming and such a cute place. I can't recommend this place enough. Definitely try it out!

Owner is incredible sweet and nice, and was worried when we ordered food that 10 whole minutes, for her to make it fresh, was too long. The Taiwanese pancake and onigiri are worth triple that wait EASY.
Plus, the milk tea, taste like good tea not just sugar.
10/10, fantastic.

The wait was worth it🥹🥹
The food and boba was really good here,, the staff is really nice i hope yhe best for them :))
Very good! I remember my favorite store in California! Good job guys
Lady was super nice and friendly at the front. My sisters had a lot of questions about boba and she was very sweet and patient. I also love onigiri one of the only places in clt to get them made!
Janice, the owner, is the sweetest ever! The products are amazing!!! You won't be disappointed!!!!

I stopped by for a road trip snack and it was so good. I got two Onigiris which were delicious and Thai milk tea with boba. I believe the owner was working that night and she let me try my tea before packaging it up to make sure it was the right sweetness.

Very welcoming and yummy boba shop. We got a strawberry matcha latte and coffee milk tea both were so delicious. Owner was very kind and interactive. A very cozy shop, definitely looking forward to returning.
Staff were so kind and welcoming and gave great recommendations. Expect to see me again!
Can’t believe it took me a year to find this spot! The owner is so kind and made me the best boba I’ve had in a long time. AND I got a really cute reusable cup in the process. Winning all the way!

Super cute boba shop! The drinks were delicious and the owner is super knowledgeable/helpful. She also makes a lot of the toppings and flavors herself! Also the cups have such adorable tops with their little bear ears. Will definitely go again when I’m in the area
This cozy shop has some of the best boba I have tried ! The person working behind the counter was kind and patient as I tried to decide .. never rushed me ! And the bubble waffles are yum !!!
Such a cute atmosphere and tasty drinks!!! I got the pandan flavour w/o any boba and it was so yummy :3
Love it really good 👍 I recommend it 👌

Everything about this place is charming. I got to speak to the business owner and she’s very kind and sweet. The music is authentic and the art is enchanting. I only dropped by for boba tea and the owner was very personable. She offered to let me try my tea before leaving, just to make sure I liked it 🥰  I ordered the Thai Black Tea Latte which was delicious with its perfectly soft and chewy boba pearls. A very respectful, chill, cute environment that I definitely would recommend.

There is a QR code on the front door to keep business hours posted; so if it’s closed at an odd hour just scan it to see when the owner will be back.
Everything we tried was so delicious. One of our favorite places from now on.
Amazing service and prices! Tea was incredible and the atmosphere is so adorable. Perfect treat for anyone in the area.
The owner was sweet and understanding, boba was delicious!
She is so sweet and her kindness was through the roof my first time being here. it tastes so good!! and the boba is perfect!
All sorts of sweet and savory Asian snack. The family loves this place. Something for everyone.
Best bubble tea in Matthews! Super friendly owner - recommend!
Absolute hidden gem! My daughter and I went in with no knowledge of boba and they were very good about walking us through the items and making great recommendations.

Came here today for the first time and it was such a great experience. The really kind woman that took our order took time to make sure that we would like our drinks by asking if we would like to try the drink first before she had sealed it off and she made sure she used every last drop for the drinks. Amazing first experience and I would definitely recommend.
Very amazing customer service. Had a wide variety of options and was made with love and care
Really cute and cozy place!
Great service, wonderful tea!
This place was amazing the dinks they had where so good they gave us free origami birds

This cafe is the absolute cutest!! My coworker bought boba for me once from here and to this day, I still use the plastic bottle because its cat ears. I went today before getting something next door, and the boba was super amazing and yummy. The owner or person working was also super sweet and energetic. The prices are also great
Greta environment and people!
super cute shop, good tea
There are a lot more choices of drinks but I just took a picture of the first drink page. Amazing atmosphere, very aesthetic. I am the 300th reviewer and can confirm that this place is amazing.
Great cute little shop!

Lofi girl like atmosphere, phenomenal staff, tasty food, and delicious boba. Plus they have the cutest art I’ve seen in a boba shop ever! I wish more shops like this were around! 😩😩

(Gave 5 star after first visit, came back again)
Oh my god it got even better, I tried the gyodon onigiri and it was awesome, but then I tried the pork floss onigiri and HOT DAMN was it good. Staff were kind and patient despite the place being busy.

Still 5/5 👹
Such a quaint, cozy little place to enjoy your tea.
Great service and location is adorable :)
By far the best boba I’ve had in Charlotte! The onigiri is very good as well!
This place is amazing, it’s chill, the boba is great, 10/10
Love their taiwanese pancake and drinks
The owner was occupied and we had to wait for more than 20 minutes and she didn't even look us in the eyes or told us to wait a second. In the end, we had to go somewhere else

Cute spot to hang out with friends. Its not just boba tea they have snack items and snow (bingsu). Its the finest shaved ice, flavored with matcha, taro or fruit. The lady was kind enough to customize my order. Yummy!
Such a cute atmosphere, super nice staff, and great tasting drinks!

Amazing boba! Great service and super cute little decorated boba shop. Will definitely come back again! The food was the perfect balance of savory and sweet and left a huge smile on my entire family’s faces. The  lady working was amazing and super kind to all of her customers, as well as an amazing drink maker! Best boba in all of Charlotte!
Loved the egg and cheese pancake and mango boba tea.
It was just amazing! This is the first time I try this drink and I liked it very much. And I'm glad that I made this drink in this place.
The drinks and atmosphere here are amazing. Ive come here a couple times when I’ve been in the area, everyone here is so kind. Ill be stopping by every time whenever I’m passing through the area : )

Amazing staff, the owner is really nice and friendly. They go out of their way to make sure you enjoy anything you buy, and always ask if theres any adjustments they can make, or anything else they can do.

I highly recommend this place to anyone who’s in the area or passing by.
Great fun, unique yummies, just a wonderful delight.
The best boba place around! Owner is amazing. She even let us come in a couple minutes past closing which was so nice and is very much appreciated!

Just went and omg sweetest lady helped us and made sure we enjoyed our tea! Didn’t get her name but she was the only one working there. And the tea is AMAZING, honeydew milk green tea and rose lychee green tea 10/10 recommend🤗
Came here while visiting charlotte and it’s very cute. Not very busy and kind of a small space. Service was excellent prices are fair and it tasted amazing.
Super cute place. Very nice staff. I like they ask about the level of sweetness you want so it's more customizable. Great tea. And super cute cups!
Super clean place! Very friendly staff and the tea and boba is amazing! Yayyy
My favorite place to get boba in Charlotte!
Incredible tea! The owner is super nice too!
Delicious boba, cute atmosphere and super sweet staff! Happy to have found a local boba spot ✨

Best place in Charlotte for authentic Taiwanese boba! The flavor of the tea is complemented by the flavoring and not dominated by sugar or syrup. For example, there were actual osmanthus flowers in the "osmanthus oolong"!!! They also tailor to your specific taste and let you try the sweetness and adjust accordingly before finishing the drink.
Very creamy and flavorful. Try regular brown sugar milk tea with creme brulee toping.
Such kind staff and great service!

The owner is so enthusiastic and kind! I haven’t tried the snacks yet, but my boba tea was great. I love that you can get whatever percentage of sweet or ice here in your drink too. The lavender was super subtle.
Love this place the owner is super cool and the teas are delish! Cute vibe too def recommend
The brown sugar latte was great. She was very friendly

This place is right beside my job and I wanted to give it a chance because I love boba so much. Definitely don’t regret it at all. Loved the service and the drink tastes amazing. Will for sure be coming back
the best boba place ong

Really impressed by how delicious and fresh the tea and toppings are, and the owner was incredibly nice and helpful!

I ordered an XL lavender oolong. I initially wanted matcha agar boba but the owner was very kind to ask if I’d had it before as not everyone likes the flavor. I’m not picky and sure I would’ve liked it, but to be safe I went with typical tapioca boba and grass jelly. She generously added in a few of the agar boba so I could try it. I really did like it! It’s soft but with more of a crunch than chew like tapioca boba, it reminds me of lychee jelly.
My fiancé ordered an XL peach green tea. She didn’t have enough peach at the time so he asked to add in passion fruit and it came out perfect!
For both our drinks she let us taste them before closing them up, which I thought was really nice and personal! And the tapioca boba is fantastic, good size with the best soft chew. Can’t wait to go back and try more!
Shop is pretty, menus are awesome and tea is delicious 😋
I tried the Hokkaido milk tea, and it was delicious! The service was quick, she let me taste it before adding ice to ensure it was sweet enough :)

This is by far the best boba tea in the Charlotte area. Owner said the teas and some ingredients are imported directly from Taiwan, where boba tea originated, hence the flavors are really authentic. The sweetness can be adjusted to one's personal preference. Apart from bubble waffles, now they also have onigiri with three different flavors. It's such a hidden gem for a quick drink and snacks. They also accept bulk party orders and the drinks will come in cute plastic flasks.
Best boba I have ever had, and customer service is chefs kiss✨✨
TOP TIER
So so so so so so good
The best boba drink I have ever had. The owner was friendly, kind, and welcoming. The decor inside is so fun. I can’t wait to try the bubble waffles!
O.M.G I LOVE this place.And the Thai black tea with the mango popping boba(a topping) Is SOOO good and I love it!
Go go go!! Read her story on her menu. Such a beautiful atmosphere and the yummiest drinks. You won’t regret, I put my soul on that.
Great service, menu selection is wonderful and has more than most other boba places. Staff is very friendly.
Customer service was really good! The people were so nice. I would highly recommend this boba place! The cups are so cute.

I think the owner got changed.  The matcha flavor was weak. The taste isn't the same as one used to get.
_ _
We got the Peach Fruit Tea& Red Guava Fruit Tea. Both were so delicious! I like it! :)

Such a welcoming small business. The interior is calming and beautiful with lots of fresh flowers. They offer beautiful book bound menus. The staff is friendly and the tea I ordered was delicious. I was able to use my laptop and get work done in a quiet place. I will definitely come back to try the food next time.
Absolute gem and must try. Hands down best oolong tea I've ever tried. Taiwanese pancakes are delicious 😋 Highly recommend!!!
Such a good spot! The lady who served us was so sweet and my drink was delicious!!
Friendly staff and really good boba. Definitely my go to boba when I’m in the area.
The drinks are so good and the woman is so gentle.
My go-to boba place in Charlotte! They are the best in the area. The owner knows so much about tea and lets you try out the tea to adjust the sweetness and taste.
Me encanto, todo estuvo muy lindo y las bebidas son muy deliciosas y eso no es todo, también tiene para tomarse fotos. Se los recomiendo mucho😍
It was really cute and aesthetic but the drinks were bad. The drinks were overly sweet and the tapioca gave a weird aftertaste.

The young girl at the counter was happy and friendly and awesome. The bubble teas were ok. The cups are really cute. However.. the older lady working there was awful to her (I assume) daughter! Yelled at her for taking an order the way she did, and kept going on and on. She made the young man who was working fumble and get nervous, and she just pushed him out of the way and pushed the girl out of the way. He just acted like that has happened all of his life, and kept talking about needing counseling, that he'd never be good enough.  It was awful.

We didn’t really know how to order boba so the owner talked us through it. She was so kind and patient! Then she let my kids try their drinks to see if she needed to make any modifications to make sure they liked them. Such a fun experience learning something new! We’ll definitely be back! Thanks Jilly!!
Nice staff, quick service, nice quiet place to work!
Place wasn’t busy but the owner was super nice! Helped us choose what drinks we wanted. Thank u!
Lovely owner very accommodating to my needs when it came to dairy milk. Super humble and sweet . Welcoming atmosphere and I enjoy how it smell sweet like waffles upon entry ~

It was super crowded but worth the wait!!! You can basically customize your drinks, and Janice is pretty quick to make your drink! It’s a small location but the best boba I’ve ever had! The tapioca was cooked well with the milk tea! Definitely recommend!

I stumbled upon this gem after a relaxing visit to a park near Monroe, and I can confidently say—this is the boba spot you don’t want to miss! From the moment I walked in, I was welcomed with such warmth and kindness. The owner is an absolute sweetheart—despite being busy, she took the time to chat with me, making me feel like a truly valued customer. Her generosity blew me away—she gave me extra boba in an extra-large cup with no ice, ensuring I got the full, flavorful experience!

And let’s talk about the boba itself—absolute perfection! The texture was spot on, the flavors were rich and refreshing, and every sip was a little piece of heaven. I was thrilled to hear they’ll be adding food to the menu soon, so you can bet I’ll be back regularly for my boba fix and some delicious snacks.

If you’re looking for the best boba experience, look no further. This spot is one of a kind, and every visit is guaranteed to be delightful. Don’t just take my word for it—go treat yourself! You won’t regret it.
delicious bubble teas, milk teas, and bubble waffles :) hidden gem.
The owner really goes above and beyond to make customers happy
Excellent all around. Pricing is great Product is great and service is great. My go to spot every Sunday.
Absolutely LOVE this place! We come here once a week, always incredible service and product! She is the sweetest woman and always remembers us. Could not recommend this place enough!
Really great place with amazing service

Great atmosphere! The boba is super delicious, I will definitely be back to get the rose green tea! The worker was the sweetest, she offered us to try the boba before she put the lid to make sure we liked it. Will definitely be back to jilly jelly, so cute!
I’ve been going here for a long time now and it’s always excellent. Both drinks and service. Janice works very hard, giving off a smile that brightens your day.

Open on New Year’s Day! I tried the matcha red bean waffle and it was good. I also tried their oolong milk tea with almond milk and boba. The boba is warm which is what I prefer ( my fav part) and brown sugar sweet! I would come back for sure. The owner was very nice as well.
Some of the best service and tea around!

Unfortunately I don’t have any photos to show how beautiful and friendly this place is. Though, this place was really nice and the drinks were amazing. Also, their matcha red bean bubble waffle were delicious. I would highly recommend this place.
Very sweet and courteous owner, quite good boba! Very good desert items too! Definitely a good place to pass by for a snack, and a good drink!!!!

The nice lady with blonde hair and glasses has an amazing 👏 amazing vibe. The place is comfy and friendly all at the same time. Me and my friends even started jamming because it was so chill. Illustrations everywhere were cute too. Please please try the raspberry  milk black tea 🍵
Amazing place! Wonderful food and amazing drinks❤️ highly recommend it!

went on christmas day so it wasn’t very busy, and the owner (i’m assuming) was extremely accommodating and polite, asking us to try each drink to test the sweetness out before she sealed it up. cute place for photos, good music, check this place out!
THE INSIDE OF THE STORE WAS SO PRETTY !!!! + the drink is so good, i’m about to finish it and I just got it less than five minutes agoooo 😍
Delicious quality boba tea spot!  The owner sources her tea from Taiwan and takes pride in her products which shows in the quality and taste!  Top notch soft, chewy & fresh boba!  Love this place!
Amazing drinks! 🤤 Wonderful customer service as well. She asked exactly what we wanted and how sweet. Got the mango green tea with boba. Delicious! And the cutest cups and artwork too!
Amazing Boba!!!! Thanks again we will be back
To make a long review short... just go! You will not, and I repeat, will not be disappointed. Had the bubble waffle and three different boba drinks.

Very tasty and delicious products!
An absolute adorable establishment!
Such a cute hidden gem! Great customer service and delicious Boba tea :)
Super pleasant interaction with the owner(?). Loved coming here. Would recommend!

Jolly Jelly had the best employee i have ever met. She was so kind and helpful. Tea was great and bubble waffle was a 12/10. I definitely recommend. Come to Jilly Jelly for the best ambience that you have ever seen. So yummy it fills up your tummy. This place helped cure my seasonal depression making me excited for winter. GET A WAFFLE IF YOU COME THEY ARE BUSSIN. Jill Jelly I will be coming back and I am extremely happy with my experience here.
Kind and very helpful.  Great service and lots of options.  Clean and warm  shop. Tea is brewed just right
This place is ridiculously cute inside and the tea is delicious! I highly recommend making a stop

Nice little place for some bobba tea.
They also sell waffles with filling that are pretty good.

The times I've gone the service is a little slow. I guess they need more workers. But definitely worth going and I'm definitely going back for my teas!

Had an amazing experience here with my boyfriend. I'm not sure if the lady helping us was the owner, but she was amazing. She was super excited to answer our questions and share stories about the culture with us. Ontop of all that, the atmosphere was so cute, warm, and welcoming. We almost turned around after finishing our drinks to get more. Can't wait to go back!
I actually threw up after drinking my drink WAY too sweet and I love boba but the boba here is disgusting. Was not worth my money or 20 minutes waiting for 2 drink on a empty monday
Great service, cute atmosphere, delicious drinks!
Great Boba and friendly service. I love all the flavors!! Highly recommend the Hokkaido milk tea!

Jilly Jelly is a true gem for boba lovers! From the moment you walk in, the cozy and vibrant atmosphere makes you feel right at home. The boba itself is always perfectly chewy, and the range of flavors they offer is impressive. Their menu balances classic milk teas with unique, creative blends—whether you’re craving something fruity, creamy, or even a bit adventurous, they’ve got you covered.

One of the standout features is their use of high-quality ingredients, which really makes a difference in every sip. You can taste the freshness, from their handcrafted jellies to their rich and smooth teas. And if you have dietary preferences, they’re super accommodating, with options for different milk types and sweetness levels.

The staff at Jilly Jelly are always friendly and ready to recommend new flavors to try. It’s clear they have a passion for what they do, and it shows in every drink they serve. Whether you’re a boba newbie or a longtime fan, Jilly Jelly is a must-visit spot that never disappoints!

I came in today as it was my first time with my brother and my mom and the owner’s aura was just so bright and illuminating. She greeted my brother by name which threw me off at first because I thought she personally knew him, turns out he’s come often already! Haha but we had a mom and daughter in front of us and just watching the interaction was just so wholesome because she makes sure each customer is taken care of and is satisfied with their drink before leaving and I just knew she puts so much passion into her craft. I love the whole ambiance of her store. I had a lavender milk tea with boba, which I love lavender although sometimes at other places it just comes out too floral/perfumey in a way but hers was just divine! I’ll have to try out her recommendation with oolong tea instead of milk tea. I live about 45 minutes away but honestly so worth it and I’ll make sure to get a few more next time I come by I just know it’ll be my favorite new boba spot in Charlotte! ❤️
Best boba. Best customer service. The young lady at the front really cares/ wants to make sure your boba tastes exactly how you want it to. Will definitely be coming back.

Having lived in Taiwan and New York, and having spent considerable time in California, + having been to the original boba shop that invented boba in Taichung several times, Jilly Jelly boba is as authentic as they come. I have had fruit flavored slushes and boba milk tea and the flavors are perfect. Hands down the best boba shop in Charlotte area!

The person serving us was so nice and told us about Hokkido and Okinawa milk tea and the differences.

The tapioca boba came out so fresh it was chewy and warm for my Hokkido milk tea
Ótimo lugar

Beautiful place , excellent customer service, clean
Over all 10/10
Awesome experience!
the owner was so so kind and provided great service!! definitely recommend checking this place out. the taro smoothie was delicious!

GREAT place for Boba Tea and MANY other wonderful eats and treats. Try the Bubble Waffle as well. Their Honey Lemon Green Tea is my favorite. And the staff is awesome, fun, and very pleasant to talk with.
i work on the other side of this building, and i'm here so often. i love the drinks, and i'm obsessed with the new bubble waffles! a great place to get a treat with some friends :)
