reviews_data.review_text: Sooooo GOOD
Amazing boba it is better than any of the boba I have tried
First time visit and we will be back. Drinks made to order and all were delicious. Very cute atmosphere. Service was great.

The lady who I assume runs the store is so nice and accommodating. The teas are delicious and I definitely will be back. Its just a bit far for me but definitely worth the drive occasionally for a nice treat

The atmosphere and vibe this place brings is unlike most in the area. Its comfortable and welcoming, with easy to understand menus and pricing, plenty of seating and accommodations for guests who are interested in trying something new. The shops owner who served me just in the first hour of opening was very kind and friendly, and considerate of my choices to ensure my milk tea was to my liking, which it was! Absolutely delicious and rich flavor, not one taste overpowered the rest. Please give Jilly Jelly a try!

Super amazing customer service. I had questions and each was answered thoroughly with lots of information I never knew about. The boba tea was delicious. The girl who took care of me was super sweet. Definitely recommend!
Such a cute delicious boba spot in matthews area, the woman working there was so sweet! Highly recommend!!!!

This place is so cute and cozy. I’m love the atmosphere and the owner is just the sweetest and most hospitable woman. I’ve never felt so comfortable or had such good service in a boba shop. I cannot recommend this place enough!

We stopped in yesterday for a drink since we were in Matthews and craving boba. Jilly Jelly actually makes true Taiwanese boba drinks. I got the rose lychee green tea and the tapioca was perfection. Bubble waffle was also delicious and the perfect snack. Highly recommend anyone to visit and try them out. Fantastic service and always love to support local small businesses.

Amazing place. They need social media presence for this business.  It is AMAZING!!!.

We went somewhere else and loved it and the other one was too far today, so we found this GEM and WOW!!!! SOOOO much better than the other place. Many of their ingredients are made from scratch. Yes. It's not a pre-made mixture.

The owner was very nice and helpful , the boba was the best I've ever had , and the Boba waffle, I never knew existed...with RUM ICE CREAM .... it's called Exhausted Parent , which is sooo true!!!

New to boba??? Jilly Jelly even let's you try some things to see what your palette likes before you order.

Spread the word for this business so they can grow.

We WILL come back, next time in Charlotte!!!!!!

Oh my gorsh! I am a Boba connoisseur from NYC and have tested out NY, New Mexico and Kentucky Boba shops and this is the very best boba drink I have tasted!!!! Earthy, complex and educational (I got to learn even more about how it’s made). This was super yummy and staff is great! I’ll be back tomorrow before finishing my Charlotte tour!
We were greeted nicely and the lady helped us out a lot with deciding.

Our family of 6 visited here for the 1st time last week. Our order consisted of 2 oreo slushies with boba, 2 Taro slushies with jelly, 1 Taro green tea with boba,  1 Melon green tea with boba. WE LOVED IT ALL!
Superior customer service to where they thoroughly explained all the options and how they differed.
Cute, comfy and clean cafe. ✨️
amazing food, owner super kind, lots of seating, very nice decor

Yummy drinks and egg waffles 😍
Very friendly staff!
great service! very fast & very yummy drinks! the decor was so cute in the shop, my friend and i enjoyed it!
Everything was perfect honestly. I asked for extra sugar and they provided it. They also asked for me to taste for sugar which was a wonderful touch. I love this place, definitely recommend for boba.

Superior service compared to any boba shop I've been to, coming from New York I am always looking for good bubble tea and I am so glad I stopped by here. The lady at the counter was very kind and let us try our drinks before she sealed them to see if we liked it as well as helped us with recommendation. Very patient as well as generous with toppings. There is a wide variety of flavors that you cannot find at shops like Kung Fu Tea or Sharetea, etc.

The inside is really cute and I see they sell egg waffles and ice cream which looks delicious.

Even my mom who doesn't like most boba said that it was really good.

We got two oolong milk teas and one dragonfruit tea with cream cheese topping and boba as well as a passionfruit green tea with boba.

I recommend anyone to come here and try out their boba.

Thanks Jilly Jelly Boba and Snow for the great experience today!
This place is so cute! The staff are polite and friendly, the atmosphere is calm and pleasant, and the drinks are delicious!
Lovely place, beautiful interior, kind employees

Coming from the university city area, this place is 50000% worth the drive. Jill is passionate, sweet, and so caring. Not to mention the drinks were made to perfection AND the inside is adorable? My boyfriend and I will totally be back. Thank you so much, Jill! 🩷
The BEST boba I have had! Will definitely be back!
The lady taking our order was amazing! My family and I enjoyed all of our drinks. Would come again
Really good boba and atmosphere. I would definitely go again if I lived in Charlotte. Highly recommended.

Best Boba place I've been too! We weren't sure exactly what we wanted, and the recommendations we were giving were perfect! They were very accommodating and patient with us while ordering and the drinks taste amazing!

This is some of the best tea in charlotte! I had the rose lychee green tea and it was perfect. The great thing is the owner has you taste it before the lid goes on and if it’s not perfect she will adjust it!

Great tea flavor and the syrup doesn’t overwhelm it.

Even close to closing she had perfectly chewy boba!
very nice place

When I walked into the Jilly Jelly there was a family of three waiting for their drinks. One of their drinks had to be remade because it spilled everywhere when the straw was inserted. There was only one bobarista working, Janice, who was doing a great job despite the rush. All the cups and spoons needed to make our drinks had to be washed, so Janice gave us an estimated wait time of 15 minutes for our four large drinks. We didn’t mind waiting as we understood the situation.
Janice lets customers try their drinks before sealing them, which I think is a very good practice.
We ordered a pineapple slush, which tasted amazing and reminded me of real sweet pineapples—definitely a 10/10. The mango slush was also very good and had an authentic taste. The passion fruit green tea was to die for; unlike other places where it's usually too sweet and tastes like you're drinking sugar water, here it was balanced deliciously. The brown sugar latte brought a sense of nostalgia, as it tasted just like Cinnamon Toast Crunch.
We also had the chance to try a soon-to-be-released item: little egg-shaped waffles filled with a choice of mozzarella, American cheese, or chocolate-filled mochi. They were so delicious and we can't wait for them to be officially launched!
Please go follow @JILLYJELLYBOBAANDSNOW on Instagram!

Very pleasant atmosphere and extremely well service. 👌 Boba is awesome! I highly recommend this place for ice cream and Boba. Everything they offer here is amazing, and it's a great place to come and chill on a hot, sunny day.
Lovely place and lovely people! Had to wait a bit but was completely worth it. 10/10 will come back again.
Super cute and relaxed spot!
10/10 GREAT EXPERIENCE!! Customer service is amazing and SO VERY FRIENDLY!!! We will absolutely be back soon!!!

Okay. I’m not the person to write a review but I had such a bad experience here. I went in and asked for a medium brown sugar latte with boba. She made the drink then asked me to “drink it down” so she could add ice to it. I asked her if she could just pour it in a large cup with ice and she said that I didn’t pay for a large… so I took a sip of the drink, she added ice, and I walked out. When I got in my car, I realized that 50% of my drink was froth. This was by far the most bizarre and awful customer service experience I’ve ever had.
The lady who works there is very nice and hospitable. I wish her business nothing but the best going forward. And I really enjoyed the raspberry milk tea Boba.
Cute aesthetic and very tasty food

Really nice little place !! I had the mango green tea with lychee jellies. Very refreshing!! My wife had a raspberry mocha slushy that was great as well. Visited while in the area, loved it! Will be back!
We love it here! The owner is the sweetest and my kids love the boba tea and bubble waffles!
Awesome boba teas
The tea is always so good, and the boba is always fresh. Highly recommend if you like boba!
Amazing!! So good, sweetest people!
Excellent Boba Tea! Very nice and helpful proprietor. We really enjoyed our teas and will be back for sure! Can’t wait!
This place is awesome!  Janice is awesome - so friendly and welcoming!!  We will be back lots

Coming from California + being Taiwanese, it’s really hard to find good boba here!! This is the only place I can say tastes like something I could get back in California or Taiwan. I super recommend coming here!! If you’ve never had boba outside of Charlotte, you should totally come try some authentic boba milk tea. Also the owner is really nice and shop is cute

Went here for the first time yesterday and had a truly nice experience. I ordered the matcha slush with boba and my sister ordered the mango black tea with mango jelly.
The owner was extremely kind and asked us about the sweetness in case she needed to tailor them more to us.

We ended up liking each other's drinks so much we switched. Hahaha

Highly recommended coming here if you're looking for a new boba place to try. Don't be afraid to tell her how little or how much sweetness you typically like!

Absolutely one of the best customer service experiences I've had. Good selection of ice cream wonderful selection of boba tea and the little Waffle thing that they make there is amazing I highly recommend this place

The owner is actually the best! She is so personable and is very passionate. The Thai tea is by far the BEST boba I’ve ever had. Everytime I go somewhere else after having her tea, I’m very disappointed..

Here’s what I like about this place, it’s a local, private owned, and higher quality than many other local options. Jill is passionate about her products. She seems to be experimenting and trying new things. She asked the customers questions and is prepared to adapt to their taste. If you want it a little more sweet, no problem. If you want it less sweet, no problem. It’s not fast food boba, it’s a craft tea beverage.
Owner is very nice and amazing! Cares a lot about every drink and is very detailed. Highly recommend for boba lovers!!!
The BEST boba tea in Charlotte!
This is a hidden gem! We popped by for a Friday afternoon treat and got 2 slushes, 2 bobas and 1 iced coffee and all were amazing!

Have been coming to this spot even before the new owner, but now the owner is extremely nice and helpful! I come in every week with my brothers and get the Lavender & Hokkaido milk tea. Favorite boba place in all of Charlotte 💜
Adorable place and it had my favorite ice cream ( super human)
I love their fruit teas (especially the honeydew)! The bubble waffle is also one of my favorites. Fun vibe and the owner is SUPER nice.
Great service, delicious tea! I’m going back when I have time to sit in their cute lounge area. Support this local small business!
Great customer service, cute shop, reasonably priced and my daughter thought her boba milk tea was delicious!
The owner is so sweet! Love this cute little place! Keep up the great work 🩷

First time here and I had a great convo with the owner. She’s so passionate about her business and took time to explain teas for us! She’s seriously so kind and informative. Can’t wait to come again! She’s awesome and the indoor is soo cute
Really lovely clean place, a gem of an owner & boba shop hidden in plain sight. Great fresh tea & toppings galore to try!
Janice was very friendly and helpful. My wife loved her peach green tea with passion fruit jellies. We'll be back soon!
Really good boba and great and friendly service.

They’re renovated lately and it looks so cute and made it extra homey. I love the decor and everytime i know i can get the same thing with the same amazing service and not have to worry. I love the ladies that are here when i am and they usually remember me or my order.

I don’t live near here much but when i am in the area i make sure to stop by!!
I tried the match milk tea with brown sugar boba, excellent flavor. Will be coming back!
Boba is delicous & the service was so friendly!
Delicious and great recommendations!

Amazing service- I was asked if I wanted to test my sweetness level before my drink was sealed, there was great attention to detail.

The Taro cream tea is very high quality and fresh- not artificially purple and very delicious.
Lovely owner, we go here very often, amazing customer service, great atmosphere, 100% recommend
Always come here after getting my nails done. Always super nice and the boba is SO GOOD 💖
Great Boba tea!
This place is the best! Absolutely amazing people and so kind! Definitely recommend!!!
the lady behind the counter was the sweetest ever in the world! so thoughtful! (and it’s delish)
It’s a very cute place and clean inside. I ordered two drinks and both were delicious. Will be coming back soon!

Best boba in Charlotte!! The tea and coffee are delicious and you can tell a lot of care goes into making it. Definitely worth giving it a try. Not to mention the boba is so soft and chewy. 🥰 super glad I decided to stop by.
This is a little boba shop. It is so good. The lady who runs it is very nice and the boba is delicious. If ever in the area give her a try!
My friend and I had a great experience at Jilly Jelly and it is by far the best boba tea I’ve had since moving to Charlotte! I highly recommend!
Great vibes, delicious tea, perfect boba
It’s so cute in here and boba was really good! The lady in there was really sweet as well.

My 4yr old son asked for boba as a special treat and we saw the reviews here. Can definitely see why this place is so highly rated! The owner was so sweet, and the drinks were even more so! Even in the rain it just hit the spot.
I LOVE their boba so much and it is the probably my number one boba place to go to.

So happy I got to try this place. I ordered Strawberry Matcha Latte and holy moly it was so good. Normally I max out on sweetness level with every boba shop I go. I decided not to here and so glad. It was the right sweet level for me. The owner was super sweet and friendly. Has lots of drink flavors I would love to try. Also, they sell ice cream as well. I am coming back when she comes out with a new flavor. Can't wait!
from NY. Craved for a boba tea nearby and I found this place to get an authentic Taiwanese bubble tea! It tasted as good as I tried in the city! Satisfying😀
Awesome place~ brown sugar bubble tea is my favorite drink. Jilly jelly makes better then gong cha and tiger suger. Best best bubble tea~~
We got the rose-lychee milk tea & the brown sugar Oreo!
Excelente!!

Owner Janice is great and very personable. I had the Thai tea and she let me adjust the sugar levels and it was great. I love the seals on the drinks. And I do like how she has redone the place, as an earlier reviewer mentioned.
This is such a cute place and has the best boba I’ve ever had

Me and my best friend came here for the first time, and she recommended us specific topics & flavors. The coconut jelly is CHEFS KISS!! The lady is so sweet as well she told us about items she’s gonna add to her new menu. Coming back once it is released!

I've been here a few times and it's amazing every time. Service is always great. I had the Dragon Fruit the first time and the Lychee tea. So good.

This family never disappoints. They also have a Poke no.1 and it's my favorite. So of course I have to check out the boba. I get something every time I go to the pet store so it's close by. Gluten and dairy free options available. Highly recommend.

Visiting from San Francisco, I asked to go to a Boba place (Boba is VERY popular there)! Stopped by here on New Year’s Day and this place is JUST like home!!
The owner was VERY helpful in helping my friend pick out his first (boba) tea drink and he actually likes it (he chose lychee jelly vs Tapioca/boba).

I HIGHLY recommend coming here for a REAL boba tea drink♥️🧋.
Thank you for the hospitality, Jilly Jelly!! Best of luck for 2024!!!!

They have Chocolate Shoppe ice cream! The tea is delicious and they were so helpful letting us adjust our sugar levels, even test-tasting the tea and refilling our drinks before sealing. It is delicious! Will definitely come back again.
Go to place.
Delicious drinks and welcoming, friendly service with a very cool, modern atmosphere. We will return for ice cream soon also.
Amazing I love it here exceptional service. Best boba in Charlotte

I came here to get boba before dropping my cousin off at her home, it was an eye opening experience. After taking just one sip of the boba I was immediately awake, no caffeine, just great boba. I got the strawberry smoothie with mango popping boba.

Excellent service, environment, and Tea's err... Ice cream in under 10 yo. Go to this establishment if looking for quality and enjoyment,  not necessarily speed of service, though they provide as quickly as a quality business can provide. Great people, great product , I will continue to make the drive from SC. Have a Great Thanksgiving.  Thank you.
Loved the Thai Milk Tea! Delicious!
I think it’s the best boba tea around here! Ordered honey green milk tea and it’s exactly how I remembered it from Taiwan! Will definitely come back :)
Love love love!!!! The owner is so sweet and kind, the atmosphere is so aesthetic and cute and the drinks are amazing! We got the mango matcha and honeydew with tapioca and they were delicious!
One word “Awesomeness”! The drinks are a Super Treat. Had the Mango and the Coconut, absolutely delicious. Be back real soon.
The drinks are refreshingly delicious and drove here to check it out. Definitely- we return again. Refreshingly Healthy Drinks
Boba tea was REALLY great! They have super premium ice cream too, which was awesome!

I recently visited this delightful bubble tea shop in Charlotte, NC, and I must say, it was an extraordinary experience! The moment I walked in, I was greeted by the friendly staff and an expansive menu. The shop is cozy, clean and cute.

The star of the show was undoubtedly their Lychee Green Tea. It was a perfect blend of refreshing green tea infused with the sweetness of lychee. The freshness and quality of the tea was truly satisfying. It was an authentic bubble tea experience better than the bubble tea shops we have in NY.

The staff was amazing. They were not only knowledgeable about their menu but also incredibly patient in helping me choose the perfect option. Their attention to detail and dedication to customer satisfaction were truly commendable.

The ambiance of the shop was cozy and inviting, making it a great place to relax and enjoy my drink. The attention to cleanliness and hygiene also added to the overall positive impression.

This bubble tea shop exceeded all my expectations. It will undoubtedly be my go-to spot for bubble tea when in NC. I can't wait to visit again and explore more of their menu!
First time here, employee was super nice! Delicious tea, would love to come back!
Janice was so sweet like her tea🧋 Definitely the spot to go in Clt/Matthews!
What a hidden gem.

My new favorite tea spot! This place is wonderful, from the moment we walked in we were impressed. The woman behind the counter was so kind and welcoming. With her suggestions and patience, as I tried to decide, it was much appreciated. We ordered the Peach Oolong tea that was just the right amount of sweet, a Boba Milk tea also incredible, and then a Dragonfruit green tea that was the perfect mixture of sour and sweet. It's such a welcoming a cute shop with so many things to try for sure. It's worth checking out!
